rotate-pdf-pages-using-pdfpageeditor.title: Rotate PDF Pages Using PdfPageEditor
rotate-pdf-pages-using-pdfpageeditor.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, rotating all pages by 90 degrees with PdfPageEditor, and saving the edited document.

rotate-pdf-page-using-pdfpageeditor-memo.title: Rotate PDF Page Using PdfPageEditor from Memory Stream
rotate-pdf-page-using-pdfpageeditor-memo.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF from a memory stream, rotating the first page with PdfPageEditor, and saving the edited document.

resize-rotate-pdf-pages.title: Resize and Rotate PDF Pages with PdfPageEditor
resize-rotate-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor to change page size (zoom) and rotate all pages, then save the edited PDF to a new file.

save-modified-pdf-to-memorystream.title: Save Modified PDF to MemoryStream Using PdfPageEditor
save-modified-pdf-to-memorystream.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF, modify its zoom factor with PdfPageEditor, and save the resulting document directly into a MemoryStream for further processing without disk I/O.

rotate-page-2-pdf-90-degrees.title: Rotate Page 2 of a PDF by 90 Degrees
rotate-page-2-pdf-90-degrees.description: Demonstrates how to rotate a specific page in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor by setting the PageRotations dictionary and applying the changes.

rotate-specific-pdf-pages.title: Rotate Specific PDF Pages Using PdfPageEditor
rotate-specific-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to rotate selected pages (3, 5, and 7) of a PDF by 180 degrees using the PdfPageEditor facade and multiple PageRotations entries.

rotate-page-four-180-degrees.title: Rotate Specific PDF Page Using PdfPageEditor
rotate-page-four-180-degrees.description: Demonstrates how to rotate page 4 of a PDF document by 180 degrees using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor facade and save the result.

retrieve-pdf-page-size-with-pdfpageedito.title: Retrieve PDF Page Size with PdfPageEditor
retrieve-pdf-page-size-with-pdfpageedito.description: Demonstrates how to open a PDF using the PdfPageEditor facade and obtain the width and height of page two via GetPageSize for logging purposes.

retrieve-page-rotation-pdf-page-editor.title: Retrieve Page Rotation Using PdfPageEditor
retrieve-page-rotation-pdf-page-editor.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with PdfPageEditor and obtain the rotation angle of a specific page (page 4) using GetPageRotation.

set-page-size-a4.title: Set Page Size to A4 for Multiple Pages
set-page-size-a4.description: Creates a sample PDF, adds pages, and sets each page's size to A4.

resize-specific-pdf-page-to-letter.title: Resize Specific PDF Page to Letter Size
resize-specific-pdf-page-to-letter.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor to change the size of a single page (page 6) to the Letter format and save the result.

zoom-page-3-to-150-percent.title: Zoom Page 3 to 150% Using PdfPageEditor
zoom-page-3-to-150-percent.description: Shows how to apply a 150% zoom (1.5 factor) to a specific page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor.

apply-zoom-to-even-pages.title: Apply Zoom to Even Pages in PDF
apply-zoom-to-even-pages.description: Shows how to set a 1.2 zoom factor on all even‑numbered pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor.

set-fade-transition-on-first-pdf-page.title: Set Fade Transition on First PDF Page
set-fade-transition-on-first-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates applying a Fade page transition with a 2‑second duration to the first page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor.

apply-dissolve-transition-to-pdf-page.title: Apply Dissolve Transition to a Specific PDF Page
apply-dissolve-transition-to-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to set a dissolve page transition with a three‑second duration on page 5 of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

set-display-duration-for-pdf-page.title: Set Display Duration for a Specific PDF Page
set-display-duration-for-pdf-page.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor to set the display duration of page 5 to five seconds for a PDF slideshow.

left-align-page-two.title: Left Align Page Two in PDF
left-align-page-two.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor to left‑justify the content of the second page of a PDF document and save the modified file.

align-page-3-vertically-to-top.title: Align Page 3 Vertically to Top
align-page-3-vertically-to-top.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor to align the content of a specific PDF page (page 3) to the top of the page.

resize-pdf-page-contents-10-percent-marg.title: Resize PDF Page Contents with 10% Margins
resize-pdf-page-contents-10-percent-marg.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades PdfFileEditor to resize the contents of all pages in a PDF by applying a 10% margin on each side.

resize-pdf-page-contents-custom-margins.title: Resize PDF Page Contents with Custom Margins
resize-pdf-page-contents-custom-margins.description: Demonstrates how to resize the contents of specific PDF pages (pages 2 and 4) by setting custom left and right margins using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.ContentsResizeParameters.

batch-rotate-first-page-pdf.title: Batch Rotate First Page of PDF Documents
batch-rotate-first-page-pdf.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor to rotate the first page of each PDF in a folder by 90 degrees and save the modified files to an output directory.

batch-convert-pdfs-to-a4.title: Batch Convert PDFs to A4 Page Size
batch-convert-pdfs-to-a4.description: Shows how to process all PDF files in a directory and resize each document to A4 dimensions using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor facade.

rotate-resize-page3-to-letter.title: Rotate and Resize Page 3 to Letter Size
rotate-resize-page3-to-letter.description: Shows how to rotate page 3 by 90° and change its dimensions to Letter (612 × 792 points) using the PdfPageEditor facade.

zoom-selected-non-consecutive-pdf-pages.title: Zoom Selected Non-Consecutive PDF Pages
zoom-selected-non-consecutive-pdf-pages.description: Loads a PDF, selects specific non‑consecutive pages using PdfPageEditor.ProcessPages, applies a common zoom factor to those pages, and saves the modified document.

set-transition-duration-for-page-range.title: Set Transition Duration for a Range of PDF Pages
set-transition-duration-for-page-range.description: Shows how to specify a range of pages with PdfPageEditor and set each page's transition duration to one second.

rotate-pdf-pages-with-validation.title: Rotate PDF Pages with Validation
rotate-pdf-pages-with-validation.description: Demonstrates how to rotate all pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor after validating that the rotation angle is one of the allowed values (0, 90, 180, 270).

handle-invalid-page-rotation.title: Handle Invalid Page Rotation with PdfPageEditor
handle-invalid-page-rotation.description: Demonstrates how to set page rotation using the PdfPageEditor facade and safely handle invalid rotation values by catching InvalidValueFormatException and applying a fallback.

create-contentsresizeparameters-with-uni.title: Create ContentsResizeParameters with Uniform Margins
create-contentsresizeparameters-with-uni.description: Demonstrates how to instantiate a ContentsResizeParameters object with a 5‑point absolute margin on all sides, ready to be used with PdfFileEditor methods such as ResizeContents or AddMargins.

create-contentsresizeparameters-15-perce.title: Create ContentsResizeParameters with Uniform 15% Margins
create-contentsresizeparameters-15-perce.description: Demonstrates how to configure a ContentsResizeParameters object with 15% margins on all sides using the static MarginsPercent method, ready for use with PdfFileEditor.

apply-different-zoom-levels-to-pdf-pages.title: Apply Different Zoom Levels to PDF Pages
apply-different-zoom-levels-to-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to iterate through each page of a PDF and set a distinct zoom factor using the PdfPageEditor facade.

apply-fade-transition-to-all-pdf-pages.title: Apply Fade Transition to All PDF Pages
apply-fade-transition-to-all-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to set a dissolve (fade) transition for every page in a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor.

assign-page-transitions-based-on-content.title: Assign Page Transitions Based on Content Type
assign-page-transitions-based-on-content.description: Shows how to examine each PDF page for images and apply distinct page transition effects using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor.

set-per-page-display-duration-by-word-co.title: Set Per-Page Display Duration Based on Word Count
set-per-page-display-duration-by-word-co.description: Extracts text from each PDF page, calculates the word count, and assigns a display duration proportional to the count using PdfPageEditor.

edit-pdf-in-memory-using-pdfpageeditor.title: Edit PDF In-Memory Using PdfPageEditor
edit-pdf-in-memory-using-pdfpageeditor.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF into a MemoryStream, modify page size and rotation with PdfPageEditor, and save the edited document back to another MemoryStream entirely in memory.

modify-page-rotation-size-zoom.title: Modify Page Rotation, Size, and Zoom Using PdfPageEditor
modify-page-rotation-size-zoom.description: Demonstrates chaining multiple page property changes—rotation, page size, zoom, and origin shift—using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor and saving the edited PDF.

reset-rotation-page-six.title: Reset Rotation of a Specific PDF Page
reset-rotation-page-six.description: Demonstrates how to reset the rotation of page 6 in a PDF to its original orientation using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

revert-page-size-of-pdf-page.title: Revert Page Size of a Specific PDF Page
revert-page-size-of-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to store the original dimensions of page 8, modify its size, and then revert it back using the Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor facade.

audit-pdf-page-size-rotation.title: Audit PDF Page Size and Rotation Before and After Editing
audit-pdf-page-size-rotation.description: Shows how to log each PDF page's width, height, and rotation, apply a rotation and size change using PdfPageEditor, and then log the updated values for audit purposes.

safely-retrieve-pdf-page-size.title: Safely Retrieve PDF Page Size with Error Handling
safely-retrieve-pdf-page-size.description: Demonstrates binding a PDF with PdfPageEditor, obtaining page dimensions via GetPageSize, and using try‑catch to gracefully handle requests for non‑existent page numbers.

apply-left-horizontal-alignment-to-pdf-p.title: Apply Left Horizontal Alignment to All PDF Pages
apply-left-horizontal-alignment-to-pdf-p.description: Demonstrates how to use PdfPageEditor to set a uniform left‑justified horizontal alignment for all pages in a PDF and save the result.

apply-vertical-alignment-to-selected-pdf.title: Apply Vertical Alignment to Selected PDF Pages
apply-vertical-alignment-to-selected-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to align the content of specific PDF pages to the top using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor and the VerticalAlignment property.

apply-boxout-transition-to-pdf-page.title: Apply BoxOut Transition to PDF Page
apply-boxout-transition-to-pdf-page.description: Shows how to set a BoxOut page transition with a 3‑second duration on the second page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

set-cover-transition-on-pdf-page.title: Set Cover Transition on Specific PDF Page
set-cover-transition-on-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to apply a Cover page transition with a 1‑second duration to page 4 of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

set-zoom-of-specific-pdf-page.title: Set Zoom of Specific PDF Page
set-zoom-of-specific-pdf-page.description: Shows how to set the zoom level of page 5 in a PDF to 75 % using Aspose.Pdf.Facades PdfPageEditor.

set-zoom-on-pdf-page-7.title: Set Zoom on PDF Page 7
set-zoom-on-pdf-page-7.description: Shows how to apply a 2.0 (200%) zoom factor to page 7 of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor.

resize-pdf-page-contents-5-percent.title: Resize PDF Page Contents Uniformly by 5%
resize-pdf-page-contents-5-percent.description: Demonstrates how to shrink all page contents of a PDF uniformly by 5% using the PdfFileEditor facade's ResizeContentsPct method.

add-20-percent-margins-to-pdf-pages.title: Add 20% Margins to PDF Pages
add-20-percent-margins-to-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to add a 20 % margin on all four sides of every page in a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor.

change-pdf-page-orientation-to-landscape.title: Change PDF Page Orientation to Landscape (A4)
change-pdf-page-orientation-to-landscape.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor facade to convert a PDF page from portrait to A4 landscape by setting a new PageSize and saving the result.

convert-pdf-portrait-to-landscape.title: Convert PDF Page from Portrait to Landscape
convert-pdf-portrait-to-landscape.description: Shows how to change a PDF page's orientation from portrait to landscape by swapping the PageSize dimensions and rotating the content using the PdfPageEditor facade.

rotate-pdf-page-180-preserve-transition.title: Rotate PDF Page 180° While Preserving Transition
rotate-pdf-page-180-preserve-transition.description: Demonstrates how to rotate a specific PDF page by 180 degrees using PdfPageEditor while keeping any existing transition effect on that page.

rotate-pdf-pages-after-resizing-contents.title: Rotate PDF Pages After Resizing Contents
rotate-pdf-pages-after-resizing-contents.description: Demonstrates how to swap a PDF page's width and height to resize its contents and then rotate each page by 90 degrees using Aspose.Pdf Facades.

incremental-update-pdf-annotation.title: Incrementally Update PDF with Text Annotation
incremental-update-pdf-annotation.description: Demonstrates opening a PDF via a read/write stream, adding a text annotation, and saving the changes as an incremental update, then using the PdfFileInfo facade to rewrite the file.

edit-pdf-save-new-with-backup.title: Edit PDF and Save as New File While Keeping Original Backup
edit-pdf-save-new-with-backup.description: Demonstrates how to create a backup of an existing PDF, edit its content using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor, and save the modified document to a separate file, leaving the original unchanged.

set-display-duration-for-pdf-pages.title: Set Display Duration for PDF Pages (Slideshow)
set-display-duration-for-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to assign a display duration to each page of a PDF using PdfPageEditor to create a timed slideshow presentation.

apply-split-transition-to-pdf-page.title: Apply Split Transition to PDF Page
apply-split-transition-to-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to set a split page transition with a two‑second duration on a specific PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

disable-page-transition-animation.title: Disable Page Transition Animation on a Specific PDF Page
disable-page-transition-animation.description: Shows how to set the transition duration to zero for page 6 of a PDF using PdfPageEditor, which disables the page transition animation.

apply-sequential-page-transitions.title: Apply Sequential Page Transitions to PDF
apply-sequential-page-transitions.description: Shows how to assign different transition effects to each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor and save the result.

set-pdf-page-zoom-to-100-percent.title: Set PDF Page Zoom to 100% Using PdfPageEditor
set-pdf-page-zoom-to-100-percent.description: Demonstrates how to set the zoom coefficient to 1.0 (100% scaling) for all pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor.

zoom-odd-pages-pdf.title: Zoom Odd Pages in PDF using PdfPageEditor
zoom-odd-pages-pdf.description: Shows how to apply a 1.2 zoom factor to all odd‑numbered pages of a PDF document with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor.

zoom-even-pages-pdf.title: Zoom Even PDF Pages to 80% Size
zoom-even-pages-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor facade to apply a 0.8 zoom factor to all even‑numbered pages in a PDF and save the result.

set-specific-pdf-pages-to-us-letter-size.title: Set Specific PDF Pages to US Letter Size
set-specific-pdf-pages-to-us-letter-size.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, resize pages 3‑6 to US Letter dimensions, and save the modified document.

resize-last-pdf-page-to-a5.title: Resize Last PDF Page to A5 Using PdfPageEditor
resize-last-pdf-page-to-a5.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor to change the size of the final page of a PDF to A5, creating a compact booklet format.

rotate-every-third-pdf-page-to-landscape.title: Rotate Every Third PDF Page to Landscape
rotate-every-third-pdf-page-to-landscape.description: Shows how to rotate every third page of a PDF by 270° using PdfPageEditor, creating an alternating landscape orientation.

retrieve-rotated-page-size.title: Retrieve Rotated Page Size with PdfPageEditor
retrieve-rotated-page-size.description: Shows how to rotate a PDF page using PdfPageEditor and then obtain the effective page dimensions, adjusting for the new orientation.

retrieve-page-rotation-after-resize.title: Retrieve Page Rotation After Resizing PDF
retrieve-page-rotation-after-resize.description: Shows how to obtain a PDF page's rotation, change the page size with PdfPageEditor, and verify that the rotation value stays the same after the resize.

apply-custom-page-transitions.title: Apply Custom Page Transitions Based on Index
apply-custom-page-transitions.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, iterate through its pages, and assign a different transition effect to each page using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor facade.

set-per-page-display-duration.title: Set Per‑Page Display Duration in PDF
set-per-page-display-duration.description: Shows how to assign a different display duration to each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor, increasing the duration by one second for each subsequent page.

center-content-horizontally-page2.title: Center Content Horizontally on Specific PDF Page
center-content-horizontally-page2.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor to center the existing content horizontally on page 2 of a PDF document.

vertically-center-content-page-three.title: Vertically Center Content on Specific PDF Page
vertically-center-content-page-three.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor to vertically align the content of page 3 to the middle and save the updated PDF.

set-horizontal-alignment-and-zoom-on-pag.title: Set Horizontal Alignment and Zoom on a Specific PDF Page
set-horizontal-alignment-and-zoom-on-pag.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor facade to center‑align content and apply a zoom factor to a single page (page 4) of a PDF document.

add-10-percent-margins-to-pdf-pages.title: Add 10% Margins to All PDF Pages
add-10-percent-margins-to-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to add a 10 % margin on all four sides of every page in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor, effectively resizing the contents for printing.

batch-set-fade-transition-pdf-slideshow.title: Batch Set Fade Transition for PDF Slideshow
batch-set-fade-transition-pdf-slideshow.description: Demonstrates how to apply a 2‑second fade (dissolve) transition to every page of a 200‑page PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor facade.

resize-pdf-pages-using-pdfpageeditor.title: Resize PDF Pages Using PdfPageEditor
resize-pdf-pages-using-pdfpageeditor.description: Shows how to load a PDF from a byte array, change its page size (e.g., to A4 landscape) with PdfPageEditor, and save the modified document to a new file.

dispose-pdfpageeditor-after-editing.title: Proper Disposal of PdfPageEditor After Page Rotation
dispose-pdfpageeditor-after-editing.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, rotating all pages using PdfPageEditor, saving the result, and correctly disposing the editor and document to release file handles.

set-custom-page-size-with-pdfpageeditor.title: Set Custom Page Size with PdfPageEditor
set-custom-page-size-with-pdfpageeditor.description: Demonstrates how to change a PDF's page dimensions to non‑standard values using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor facade.

rotate-pdf-pages-using-pdfpageeditor__v2.title: Rotate PDF Pages Using PdfPageEditor
rotate-pdf-pages-using-pdfpageeditor__v2.description: Shows how to rotate all pages of a PDF by setting the Rotation property of PdfPageEditor and saving the modified document.

set-page-transition-effects.title: Set Page Transition Effects in PDF using Aspose.Pdf
set-page-transition-effects.description: Demonstrates how to apply fade, box‑out, and cover transitions to individual PDF pages using the PdfPageEditor facade.

set-pdf-page-zoom-using-pdfpageeditor.title: Set PDF Page Zoom Using PdfPageEditor
set-pdf-page-zoom-using-pdfpageeditor.description: Shows how to apply a precise zoom factor to a PDF document by using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor to modify page scaling.

set-slide-display-duration.title: Set Slide Display Duration for PDF Pages
set-slide-display-duration.description: Shows how to assign an integer display duration (in seconds) to individual PDF pages using PdfPageEditor, enabling timed slide transitions.

set-page-content-horizontal-alignment.title: Set Page Content Horizontal Alignment in PDF
set-page-content-horizontal-alignment.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor to change the horizontal alignment (left, center, right) of all page content in a PDF and save the modified document.

resize-pdf-contents-uniform-margins.title: Resize PDF Page Contents with Uniform Margins
resize-pdf-contents-uniform-margins.description: Demonstrates using PdfFileEditor.ResizeContents together with ContentsResizeParameters.MarginsPercent to apply equal margins to every page of a PDF document.

resize-pdf-contents-asymmetric-margins.title: Resize PDF Page Contents with Asymmetric Margins
resize-pdf-contents-asymmetric-margins.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to resize the contents of selected PDF pages by specifying different left, right, top, and bottom margins.

resize-pdf-contents-top-bottom-margins.title: Resize PDF Page Contents with Top and Bottom Margins
resize-pdf-contents-top-bottom-margins.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to resize the contents of a PDF document, applying different top and bottom margins while leaving left and right margins automatic.

rotate-pdf-page-reset-orientation.title: Rotate PDF Page and Reset Orientation
rotate-pdf-page-reset-orientation.description: Demonstrates rotating a PDF page using PdfPageEditor, saving the rotated file, then restoring the original rotation to show reversible changes.

resize-pdf-page-size-and-revert.title: Resize PDF Page Size and Revert to Original
resize-pdf-page-size-and-revert.description: Demonstrates how to change the page size of a PDF to custom dimensions using PdfPageEditor, then restore the original size to verify undo functionality.

log-pdf-page-property-modifications.title: Log PDF Page Property Modifications with PdfPageEditor
log-pdf-page-property-modifications.description: Demonstrates how to modify PDF page properties such as zoom, rotation, size, display duration, and transition using the PdfPageEditor facade, while logging each change to a text file for audit and debugging.

generate-page-properties-report-before-a.title: Generate Page Properties Report Before and After PDF Edit
generate-page-properties-report-before-a.description: The example captures original page dimensions and rotation, applies a 90° rotation and 50% zoom using PdfPageEditor, then records the new properties and prints a side‑by‑side comparison.

rotate-pages-encrypted-pdf.title: Rotate Pages of an Encrypted PDF using PdfPageEditor
rotate-pages-encrypted-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to open an encrypted PDF by supplying a password, rotate all its pages with PdfPageEditor, and save the result.

edit-signed-pdf-pages-preserve-signature.title: Edit Pages of a Digitally Signed PDF While Preserving Signatures
edit-signed-pdf-pages-preserve-signature.description: Loads a digitally signed PDF, checks for existing signatures, and uses PdfPageEditor to rotate, resize, and process selected pages, saving the document incrementally so the original signatures remain valid.

resize-pdf-pages-preserve-annotations.title: Resize PDF Pages While Preserving Annotations
resize-pdf-pages-preserve-annotations.description: Shows how to change the page size of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor, ensuring that all existing annotations and interactive elements remain functional after resizing.

preserve-form-fields-while-rotating-pdf-.title: Preserve Form Fields While Rotating PDF Pages
preserve-form-fields-while-rotating-pdf-.description: Shows how to keep AcroForm fields functional after rotating PDF pages by exporting the fields to FDF, rotating the pages, and re‑importing the fields.

apply-transitions-to-odd-pages.title: Apply Transitions to Odd Pages in PDF
apply-transitions-to-odd-pages.description: Shows how to add a page transition effect (e.g., dissolve) only to odd‑numbered pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor.

set-display-duration-even-pages.title: Set Display Duration for Even Pages in PDF
set-display-duration-even-pages.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor to assign a custom display duration to even‑numbered pages of a PDF document.

zoom-pdf-pages-with-images.title: Zoom PDF Pages Containing Images
zoom-pdf-pages-with-images.description: Shows how to detect pages that contain images in a PDF and apply a zoom factor only to those pages using Aspose.Pdf.

resize-contents-only-on-pages-with-text.title: Resize Contents of Pages Containing Text
resize-contents-only-on-pages-with-text.description: The example scans a PDF to find pages that contain any text and then resizes the contents of only those pages using PdfFileEditor.ResizeContents. If no text is found, the original file is copied unchanged.

apply-rotation-zoom-transition-to-pdf-pa.title: Apply Rotation, Zoom, and Transition to PDF Pages
apply-rotation-zoom-transition-to-pdf-pa.description: Demonstrates using PdfPageEditor to rotate, zoom, and add a transition effect to all pages of a PDF, then save the modified document.

set-custom-a4-landscape-page-size.title: Set Custom A4 Landscape Page Size
set-custom-a4-landscape-page-size.description: Shows how to change a PDF's page dimensions to A4 landscape using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor and the PageSize class.

set-pdf-page-size-to-letter-portrait.title: Set PDF Page Size to Letter Portrait Using PdfPageEditor
set-pdf-page-size-to-letter-portrait.description: Shows how to resize all pages of a PDF to the standard Letter portrait dimensions (8.5×11 inches) with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor.

rotate-landscape-pages-based-on-metadata.title: Rotate Landscape Pages Based on PDF Metadata
rotate-landscape-pages-based-on-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to read a custom PDF metadata entry that lists page numbers, then rotate those pages to landscape orientation using Aspose.Pdf facades.

set-page-transition-duration-based-on-ti.title: Set Page Transition Duration Based on Title Length
set-page-transition-duration-based-on-ti.description: Shows how to assign a PDF page transition duration that varies with the length of each page's title using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor.

adjust-pdf-zoom-by-word-count.title: Adjust PDF Page Zoom Based on Word Count
adjust-pdf-zoom-by-word-count.description: Demonstrates how to analyze each PDF page's word count and apply a per‑page zoom level, giving higher zoom to pages with fewer words for better readability.

batch-change-pdf-page-size.title: Batch Change PDF Page Size Using PdfPageEditor
batch-change-pdf-page-size.description: Shows how to iterate through PDFs in a folder and assign a specific page size to each document using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor facade.

extract-rotate-selected-pdf-pages.title: Extract and Rotate Selected PDF Pages
extract-rotate-selected-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to extract specific pages from a PDF, rotate those pages, and save the result as a new PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

merge-pdfs-with-aligned-margins.title: Merge PDFs with Aligned Margins
merge-pdfs-with-aligned-margins.description: Shows how to add uniform margins to multiple PDF files and then concatenate them into a single document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

resize-pdf-and-split-into-chapters.title: Resize PDF Pages to A4 and Split into Chapter Files
resize-pdf-and-split-into-chapters.description: Demonstrates how to resize all pages of a PDF to a uniform A4 size using PdfPageEditor, then split the resized document into separate one‑page PDFs representing individual chapters.

create-pdf-slideshow-with-page-transitio.title: Create PDF Slideshow with Page Transitions and Durations
create-pdf-slideshow-with-page-transitio.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor to assign transition effects and display times to individual pages and then save the document as a slideshow PDF.

set-boxout-transition-zoom-page.title: Set BoxOut Transition with Zoom on a Specific PDF Page
set-boxout-transition-zoom-page.description: Demonstrates how to apply a BoxOut page transition and a 1.3× zoom effect to page two of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor.

center-page-alignment-set-display-durati.title: Center Page Content and Set Display Duration
center-page-alignment-set-display-durati.description: Demonstrates how to center the content of a specific PDF page and set its slide‑show display duration using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-5-percent-margins-and-print-pdf.title: Add 5% Margins to PDF Pages and Print
add-5-percent-margins-and-print-pdf.description: The example demonstrates how to add a uniform 5 % margin to every page of a PDF using PdfFileEditor, then print the modified document with PdfViewer while automatically resizing and rotating to fit the printable area.

create-booklet-pdf-with-15-percent-margi.title: Create Booklet PDF with 15% Page Margins
create-booklet-pdf-with-15-percent-margi.description: Shows how to add a 15 % margin to selected pages and then convert the PDF into a booklet layout using Aspose.Pdf.

rotate-pdf-pages-to-landscape.title: Rotate PDF Pages to Landscape for Brochure Printing
rotate-pdf-pages-to-landscape.description: Shows how to rotate every page of a PDF 90° clockwise and set the page size to A4 landscape using the Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor facade.

change-pdf-page-size-to-a3.title: Change PDF Page Size to A3 Using PdfPageEditor
change-pdf-page-size-to-a3.description: Demonstrates how to resize all pages of an existing PDF to A3 dimensions using the Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor facade.

set-pdf-zoom-preview-final.title: Set PDF Zoom for Preview and Final Output
set-pdf-zoom-preview-final.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor to apply different zoom levels (50% for preview, 100% for final) to a PDF and save the results as separate files.

apply-page-settings-from-json.title: Apply Page Settings from JSON Configuration to PDFs
apply-page-settings-from-json.description: Demonstrates how to read a JSON file and programmatically adjust rotation, size, and zoom of selected PDF pages using Aspose.Pdf.

hybrid-content-resize-mixed-margins.title: Hybrid Content Resize with Mixed Percentage and Absolute Margins
hybrid-content-resize-mixed-margins.description: Shows how to create a ContentsResizeParameters object that combines percentage‑based and absolute margins and apply it to all pages of a PDF using PdfFileEditor.

apply-page-transitions-by-index.title: Apply Page Transition Effects Based on Page Index
apply-page-transitions-by-index.description: Shows how to assign different transition types to each PDF page using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor, cycling through three transitions with a modulo‑3 index.

rotate-resize-zoom-pdf-pages.title: Rotate, Resize, and Zoom PDF Pages with PdfPageEditor
rotate-resize-zoom-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor to rotate pages, set a custom page size, apply a zoom factor, and save the edited PDF.
